1: It is like 2048 but with division.
2048: The classic 2048 game, where you combine blocks to get to a 2048 block.
Ages-Of-Conflict: A strategy simulation game where you build an army and kill bad guys.
Awesome-Tanks-2: A tank battle game with various modes and maps. You can upgrade your stats too.
Babel-Tower: A game where you build a tower as high as possible by getting resources and stuff.
Baldis-Basics: A game where you have to collect notebooks while avoiding the dreaded bald boy, Baldi.
Basketball-Random: A game where you control a stick guy and try to play basketball. This has been modded by me.
Basketball-Stars: A multiplayer basketball game with various modes and customization options.
Basket-Bros: A game where you play basketball.
BitLife: A life game where you get to make choices that affect your ingame life. This version is extreneky outdated, so expect it to be missing a lot.
Black-Jack: A classic card game where you try to get as close to 21 as possible without going over.
Block-Blast: A block-breaking game where have to clear blocks with more blocks.
Boxing-Random: A boxing game with random elements and various characters.
Breaking-The-Bank: A game where you break the bank. Were you expecting more?
BTD5: A tower defense game with various towers and enemies.
Burgeria: A time management game where you run a burger restaurant.
Case-Clicker: A game where you open cases to get virtual items and earn in-game currency.
Coil: A game where you try to eat other small balls.
Cookie-Clicker: A game where you get to make money from selling cookies by clicking a button, while somehow being able to upgrade the cookies.
Core-Ball: A game where you control a ball and navigate through various levels and obstacles.
Crazy-Tunnel-3d: A fast-paced game where you navigate a ball through a tunnel filled with obstacles.
Crossing-The-Pit: Have you ever wanted to cross a pit? Well, in Crossing-The-Pit, you can do so!
Crossy-Road: A game where you cross roads and rivers while trying to avoid obstacles.
Cupcake-2048: A puzzle game where you combine cupcakes to reach the beloved 2048 tile.
Cupcakeria: A game where you help manage a cupcake shop and serve customers.
Cut-The-Rope: A puzzle game where you cut ropes to feed candy to a fat little shit named Om Nom.
Doge-Miner: A game where you mine for dogecoins and upgrade your mining equipment using said dogecoins.
Doom: An unofficial web port of the classic first-person shooter game where you kill demons.
Draw-The-Hill: A game where you draw lines to help a little guy navigate through hills and obstacles.
Drift-Boss: A racing game where you drift around corners to earn points.
Duck-Life-4: A game where you train a duck to compete in races and other challenges.
Eggy-Car: A game where you drive a car while balancing an egg on top of it.
Evo-Wars: A game where you evolve a creature by eating smaller creatures and avoiding larger ones.
Fear-Assessment: A horror game like 'The Survey Game' where you take a survey. Very good.
Freezeria: A time management game where you run an ice cream shop.
Friday-Night-Funking: A game where you make music to bring a dad back or some shit like that. Modded to be harder.
Geometry-Dash-Remastered: A platformer game where you navigate through levels filled with obstacles. Very popular.
Getaway-Shootout: A multiplayer shooting game where players try to escape while others try to stop them.
Gun-Mayhem-2: A shooting game with some characters and weapons.
Gun-Spin: A game where you spin a gun and try to shoot targets while avoiding obstacles.
Habibi_Highways: A game where an arab does running and shit.
Hextris: A puzzle game where you stack lines to form big lines. Inspired by tetris.
Hide-And-Smash: A multiplayer game where players hide and seek while trying to smash each other.
Hole-io: A game where you control a black hole and try eat people and objects.
House-Of-Hazards: A multiplayer game where players navigate through a house filled with traps and obstacles.
Jack-Smith: A game where you craft weapons and armor to defeat enemies and complete quests.
Just-Fall: A multiplayer game where players try to avoid falling off platforms while competing against each other.
Lazy-Jump-3d: A game where you are a dumb, dead lumpy boy that is too lazy to get up, and resorts to flopping around instead of walking.
Learn-Man-Fish: Motivational quotes. All quotes are accurate.
Minecraft-1.11.2: It is just Minecraft in the browser. The original developer actually got multiple DMCA takedowns for this and I hope I do not get one as well.
Monkey-Mart: A game where monkeys can get bananas and sell them.
Monster-Tracks: A game where you jump over obstacles and shi. Nothing more, really.
MotoX3M-Pool: A motorcycle racing game with various levels and obstacles.
MotoX3M-Spooky: A motorcycle racing game with a spooky theme and various levels and obstacles
MotoX3M-Winter: A motorcycle racing game with a winter theme and various levels and obstacles.
MotoX3M2: A motorcycle racing game with various levels and obstacles.
Pancakeria: A management game where you run a pancake restaurant.
Papa-Louie: A management game where you run a pizzeria.
Paper-io-2: A multiplayer game where you control a cube and run around aimlessly.
Physix: A physics sandbox game. Supports springs, ropes, and other constraints.
Pixel-Gun: A first-person shooter game with various weapons and multiplayer modes.
Pizzeria: A management game where you run a pizza restaurant.
Roof-Top-Snipers: A game where you try to snipe people from the roof.
Scooperia: A management game where you run an ice cream shop.
Slope: A fast-paced game where you navigate a ball down a slope while avoiding obstacles.
Snow-Rider-3d: A snowboarding game where you perform tricks and navigate through courses.
Stack-Bump-3d: A game where you stack blocks while avoiding obstacles to reach new heights.
Stacktris: A puzzle game where you stack blocks to clear blocks.
Stickman-Golf: A golf game where you control a stickman and try to complete courses in as few strokes as possible.
Subway-Surfers: A game where you run from a fat fuck cop for property damage.
Tank-Trouble: A tank battle game with various maps and modes.
Temple-Run-2: An endless runner game where you control a character running through a temple while avoiding obstacles.
Time-Shooter-3: A shooting game where you control a character and shoot enemies while avoiding their attacks.
Tiny-Fishing: A game where you fish for fish and sell the fish to get more fish.
Worlds-Hardest-Game: A challenging game where you navigate a small square through levels.
